---
name: Playbook proposal
about: Propose a new playbook for the library
title: "Playbook: "
labels: playbook
assignees: ""
---

## Department

One of: Strategy, Brand, Product, Engineering, Data, Growth, Sales, Finance,
Legal, Success, Operations.

## Level

0 to 8, or always-on. When in a company's life does this become runnable, and
what must already exist?

## What it produces

The finished artifact a founder gets when this playbook runs (a memo, a model, a
page, a system). Be concrete: what sections, what quality bar.

## Evidence it matters

Why this deserves a place in the library. Real experience running it, businesses
that died without it, or sources that show the job is real and commonly botched.

## Scope

- Which business types it applies to (and which it must exclude)
- What it depends on, and what it unblocks

Ready to write it yourself? Draft it in `docs/playbook-drafts/` with the
frontmatter contract from `docs/PLAYBOOK-SCHEMA.md` and open a PR; see
CONTRIBUTING.md for the workflow.
